Footer.tagline: Premier business advisory in Uzbekistan. Integrated consulting across tax, legal, finance, and HR — a single point of contact for your entire operation.

Hero.subtitle: Strategic counsel for businesses entering and operating across Central Asia.

hero.heading: Integrated services, singular results
hero.description: Seven advisory disciplines. Seven managed operations services. One integrated practice built for the complexities of Central Asian markets.

trackRecord.heading: Selected engagements of our team members

cta.heading: Ready to work together?
cta.description: Tell us about your business — we will identify where we can make the most impact and structure a scope that fits.

hero.heading: Ready-to-use documents for doing business in Uzbekistan
hero.description: Professionally drafted legal, tax, HR, and compliance templates — built for Uzbekistan's regulatory framework, available in English, Russian, and Uzbek.

cta.heading: Can't find what you're looking for?
cta.description: Our team drafts bespoke documents tailored to your specific transaction, structure, or jurisdiction.

hero.heading: Research & analysis on doing business in Uzbekistan
hero.description: Practical guides, regulatory briefings, and analytical commentary from our advisory team.

hero.heading: Begin a conversation
hero.description: Every engagement starts with understanding. Reach out and our team will respond within 24 hours.

form.heading: Send us a message
form.description: For detailed inquiries — share project context, timeline, and area of interest. We'll get back to you with a tailored response.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your project or question...
form.consentBefore: I consent to the processing of my personal data in accordance with the
form.consentAfter: . By submitting this form you confirm your agreement to the storage and processing of the provided data.

quick.heading: Need a faster reply?
quick.description: Skip the form — message us directly on Telegram or WhatsApp. Average response in under 30 minutes during business hours.

AdvisorySection.heading: You consult — we counsel
AdvisorySection.description: Strategic guidance across tax, legal, finance, HR, funding, M&A, and due diligence. You make the decisions; we provide the depth.

OperationsSection.heading: You delegate — we execute
OperationsSection.description: Fully managed services where we handle execution on your behalf — one contract, one point of contact, full compliance.

InsightsSection.heading: Research, guides & analysis
InsightsSection.flagshipDescription: The definitive guide for foreign investors — market entry, regulatory frameworks, and operational best practices.

coverage.heading: One partner, every discipline
coverage.description: Tax, legal, finance, HR, and funding — working in concert on a shared view of your business.

geography.heading: All of Uzbekistan, from a single advisory partner

values.heading: What we stand for
values.p1: Advizen is a one-stop business advisory partner in Uzbekistan — offering integrated consulting across tax, legal, finance, and HR under a single point of contact.
values.p2: We combine deep local expertise with international standards, helping businesses navigate Central Asia's regulatory landscape while focusing on growth.
values.tap: Tap a node to explore our core values →

oneStop.title: One-Stop Shop
oneStop.content: Tax, legal, finance, and HR — all under one roof. No need to juggle multiple firms. One partner, one point of contact, complete coverage.

clientFirst.title: Client-First
clientFirst.content: Every engagement is tailored to your business. We listen before we advise, and we measure our success by yours. Your goals become our mission.

localExpertise.title: Local Expertise
localExpertise.content: Deep knowledge of Uzbekistan's regulatory landscape and Central Asian markets. We navigate the complexities so you can focus on growth.

trustedTeam.title: Trusted Team
trustedTeam.content: A multidisciplinary team of seasoned professionals across tax, law, finance, and consulting. Coordinated expertise, unified strategy.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.content: Transparency and ethical standards are non-negotiable. We build relationships on trust, delivering honest counsel even when it's not the easiest path.

cta.heading: Ready to begin?
cta.description: Whether you are entering Uzbekistan or expanding operations across Central Asia, our team is prepared to advise.
